titleStmt.title: SII 26.552: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 552. (A.R. No. 522 of 1909.) TENKĀŚI, TENKASI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhº Vīrapāṇḍyadēva Year 2+11 Karkkaṭaka (Āḍi) 30, śu., 15, Monday, Śravaṇa = 1434 A.D. July. But it was (Āḍi) 23, Wednesday.

summary.p: This inscription records a gift, made by the king, of 10 mā of land in Adaḷaikuḷakkīḻ in Kallaga-nāḍu, to provide for the offering daily of 12 paṇiyāram (sweatmeat) to the god Viśvanātha. It is stated that the gift was a dēvadāna, and it should take effect from the 11th year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟavarmmarāna tribhuvanaścakravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatiṉ Etirpatiṉoṉṟāvatu karkkaṭaka ñāyiṟṟu muppatāntiyati yum pūrṇaiyum somavāramum peṟṟa tiruvoṉattunāḷ Uṭaiyār viśvanādhan koyilil tāṉattārkku Uṭaiyār viśvanāthan Amutuceyyumpaṭi nāḷ Oṉṟukku nām
cevitta tiruppaṇiyāram paṉṉiraṇṭukku Amutupaṭi nāḻiyum paruppu nāḻiyum caṟkaṟai Amutu palam Eḻum teṅkāy Amutu Oṉṟum neyyamutu Uḻakkum Ākak kaṟpitta Itukkup patiṉ Oṉṟāvatu kārmutalukkut tevatāṉamāka viṭṭa nilam pattu māvukkuk kallakanāṭṭu Ataḷaikuḷattiṉkiḻ Oṉpatāṅ kaṇ
ṇāṟu meṟku niṉṟuṅ karaikkuṅ kālukkuṅ kiḻakkunilam nālumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉkiḻ mukkāle Araikkālum pattāṅkaṇṇāṟu kiḻakku niṉṟum kāṭu taricukku meṟkum vaṭakkunilam nālumāmukkāṇiyiṉ kiḻmukkāle muṉṟu mā mukkāṇiyum patiṉoṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟu meṟku
niṉṟum taṭipala viṭṭukkiḻakku nilam mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉkiḻ muṉṟumā mukkāṇiyum Ākanilam pattu mā Iṉṉilam māvum Iṉṉāḷ mutalukkuk kaiyāṇṭu tiruppaṇiyāramum kuraivar naṭattip potumpaṭi kaṟpitta Aḷavukku Immāriyātiyile Ivvolai piṭipāṭāka
candrādityavaṟ cellak kallilum cempilum veṭṭi Ivvālaiyam Uṭaiyavaṟai tevatāṉamākak kaiyāṇṭu koṇṭu tiruppaṇiyāramum kuṟaivaranaṭattippotavum pāṟka Ivai taccūruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu § tulyam §
Digital edition of SII 26.552 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
